_comment: Tracked upstream repos — checked every 3 days by tools/upstream-check.js

repos.description: MCS YAML authoring skills, templates, schemas, scripts
repos.notes: Full 5-phase integration. Watch for new skills, template changes, schema updates.

repos.description: 70 eval scenarios across business-problem + capability dimensions
repos.notes: Used by eval framework. Watch for new scenarios or scoring changes.

repos.description: Power CAT testing framework, Dataverse entities, test execution
repos.notes: Used by powercat-test.js. Watch for entity schema changes, new test types.

repos.description: Official MCS samples: adaptive cards, topics, solutions, extensibility, SSO, testing
repos.notes: 717 stars. Watch for new card snippets, topic patterns, solution samples, extensibility patterns.

repos.description: Unified declarative YAML spec bridging Copilot Studio and Azure Foundry. Joint MCS + Foundry collaboration.
repos.notes: Critical for DA+CA convergence. Watch for schema version changes, new agent types, runtime library updates.

repos.description: Community-contributed M365 Copilot samples. Canonical source for declarative agent samples (migrated from OfficeDev).
repos.notes: Best source for DA patterns: API plugins, knowledge configs, conversation starters. Watch for new agent samples.

repos.description: M365 Agents SDK hub. Includes copilotstudio-client sample for programmatic MCS agent invocation.
repos.notes: Core SDK for custom engine agents. Watch for new integration patterns, protocol changes, Copilot Studio client updates.

repos.description: Hands-on labs covering both DA and custom engine agent approaches. Best structured learning path.
repos.notes: Labs reflect latest MCS/M365 Copilot features. Watch for new lab paths, updated API usage, deprecated patterns.

repos.description: Hands-on labs for building AI agents with Copilot Studio. Includes Agent Builder, MCP, multi-agent, ALM labs.
repos.notes: Official MCS labs reflect latest Copilot Studio capabilities. Watch for new lab content revealing new features.
